mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form(id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses, closes_at) VALUES (#{formId}, #{ownerId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{costCredits}, #{maxResponses}, #{closesAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE form SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, max_responses = #{maxResponses}, closes_at = #{closesAt}, confirmation_message = #{confirmationMessage}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId}
UPDATE form SET closes_at = #{closesAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_section(id, form_id, order_index, title) VALUES (#{sectionId}, #{formId}, #{orderIndex}, #{title})
mapper.select: SELECT id, form_id, order_index, title FROM form_section WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM form_section WHERE form_id = #{formId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM form_question WHERE section_id = #{sectionId}
SELECT id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses, closes_at, share_token, confirmation_message FROM form WHERE id = #{formId}
SELECT id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses, closes_at, share_token, confirmation_message FROM form WHERE share_token = #{shareToken}
SELECT id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses, closes_at, share_token, confirmation_message FROM form WHERE id = #{formId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM survey_response WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND quality_flag = 'pass'
SELECT id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses, closes_at, share_token, confirmation_message FROM form WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

WITH pass_counts AS ( SELECT form_id, COUNT(*)::int AS pass_count FROM survey_response WHERE quality_flag = 'pass' GROUP BY form_id ) SELECT DISTINCT ON (f.id) f.id AS "formId", f.title AS "title", f.owner_id AS "ownerId", f.cost_credits AS "costCredits", f.share_token AS "shareToken" FROM survey_response r JOIN form myf ON myf.id = r.form_id AND myf.owner_id = #{viewerId} JOIN form f ON f.owner_id = r.respondent_id AND f.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN pass_counts pc ON pc.form_id = f.id WHERE (f.closes_at IS NULL OR f.closes_at > now()) AND COALESCE(pc.pass_count, 0) < f.max_responses AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM survey_response r2 WHERE r2.form_id = f.id AND r2.respondent_id = #{viewerId} ) ORDER BY f.id, f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.id AS "responseId", r.form_id AS "formId", f.title AS "formTitle", f.owner_id AS "ownerId", r.quality_flag AS "qualityFlag", r.anon_label AS "anonLabel", r.submitted_at AS "submittedAt", f.cost_credits AS "costCredits" FROM survey_response r JOIN form f ON f.id = r.form_id WHERE r.respondent_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.submitted_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.id AS "formId", f.title AS "title" FROM form f WHERE f.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND f.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (f.closes_at IS NULL OR f.closes_at > now()) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM survey_response r WHERE r.form_id = f.id AND r.respondent_id = #{viewerId} ) ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE form SET status = 'PAUSED', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE form SET status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId} AND status = 'PAUSED'
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM form_section WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT type FROM form_question WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC

SELECT id, section_id, form_id, type, title, required, order_index, min_select, max_select, min_length, max_length, regex, scale_min, scale_max, body_html, image_url, attention_answer, allow_other, shuffle_options, row_labels, branch_rules FROM form_question WHERE id = #{questionId} AND form_id = #{formId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_question( id, section_id, form_id, type, title, required, order_index, min_select, max_select, min_length, max_length, regex, scale_min, scale_max, body_html, image_url, attention_answer, allow_other, shuffle_options, row_labels, branch_rules) VALUES ( #{questionId}, #{sectionId}, #{formId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{required}, #{orderIndex}, #{minSelect}, #{maxSelect}, #{minLength}, #{maxLength}, #{regex}, #{scaleMin}, #{scaleMax}, #{bodyHtml}, #{imageUrl}, #{attentionAnswer}, COALESCE(#{allowOther}, false), COALESCE(#{shuffleOptions}, false), #{rowLabels, typeHandler=egovframework.pmsi.form.service.impl.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{branchRules, typeHandler=egovframework.pmsi.form.service.impl.JsonMapTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE form_question SET section_id = #{sectionId}, type = #{type}, title = #{title}, required = #{required}, min_select = #{minSelect}, max_select = #{maxSelect}, min_length = #{minLength}, max_length = #{maxLength}, regex = #{regex}, scale_min = #{scaleMin}, scale_max = #{scaleMax}, body_html = #{bodyHtml}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, attention_answer = #{attentionAnswer}, allow_other = COALESCE(#{allowOther}, false), shuffle_options = COALESCE(#{shuffleOptions}, false), row_labels = #{rowLabels, typeHandler=egovframework.pmsi.form.service.impl.JsonListTypeHandler}, branch_rules = #{branchRules, typeHandler=egovframework.pmsi.form.service.impl.JsonMapTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{questionId} AND form_id = #{formId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_question_option(id, question_id, label, order_index) VALUES (#{optionId}, #{questionId}, #{label}, #{orderIndex})
mapper.update: UPDATE form SET status = 'ACTIVE', cost_credits = #{cost}, share_token = #{shareToken}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE form SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT id, section_id, form_id, type, title, required, order_index, min_select, max_select, min_length, max_length, regex, scale_min, scale_max, body_html, image_url, attention_answer, allow_other, shuffle_options, row_labels, branch_rules FROM form_question WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
SELECT label FROM form_question_option WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
